expectations.text: 明列至少 5 個臉部特徵錨點
含 Do not redesign 或保留人臉指令
expectations.evidence: missing all of: ['do not redesign', 'preserve her face', 'preserve the same', 'keep the face']

expectations.text: 含 'change only X' 編輯約束
expectations.evidence: missing all of: ['change only', 'only the wardrobe', 'only the pose']

expectations.text: 使用 images.edit 端點 (或 payload 含 image 陣列)
API payload 指定 model: gpt-image-2
Constraints 段含至少 8 條排除指令 (No X / Do not X)
